raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, This is regarding American Express dispute ref no. XXXX ( {$380.00} ) and XXXX ( {$2000.00} ), I provided third party impartial evidence the items in the XXXX order # XXXX were returned. In fact the XXXX tracking for BOTH items in the order show they were RETURNED to sender and left with sender. See XXXX  tracking # XXXX and XXXX. The XXXX tracking shows the packages were marked damaged, and it expressly says the Merchandise left with sender. And the status on the XXXX website says RETURNED. 

I believe American Express is discriminating against my race ( XXXX ) and discrediting the third party evidence I provided showing the items in the order were returned and left with sender, and they are discounting my evidence because I am XXXX and the merchant is not a minority and is a big business. This is unacceptable. American Express discrimination must end. 

I am owed a total of {$2400.00} for this order due to both items being marked DAMAGED and RETURNED left with sender. American Express is discounting my evidence due to my race and their discrimination against me. This has to stop and I am owed my money from this transaction. 

Sincerely, XXXX
